headline: Morgan Stanley Raises PT on Monster Beverage (MNST) Stock
summary: Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) is one of the Best Blue Chip Stocks Under $100 to Buy Now. On June 1, Morgan Stanley analyst Dara Mohsenian lifted the firm’s price objective on the company’s stock to $103 from $100 and maintained an “Overweight” rating on the shares. headline: CELH and Zero-Sugar Energy Trends to Watch Through 2026
summary: CELH is focusing on low- and zero-sugar energy, with its portfolio driving a large share of U.S. zero-sugar category growth in Q1 2026.

headline: Is CELH a Buy After Q1 2026 Results and Share Buybacks?
summary: CELH grew Q1 2026 revenue 138%, repurchased shares, and saw gross margin drop as its three-brand energy portfolio expanded.

headline: MONSTER BEVERAGE CORP (NASDAQ:MNST) Hits Perfect Technical Score with Tight Breakout Setup
summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) scores a perfect technical rating of 10 and an 8 setup quality, forming a tight consolidation pattern near 52-week highs with a clear breakout entry point above $89.56.

headline: How The Monster Beverage (MNST) Narrative Is Evolving Without New Analyst Signals
summary: Monster Beverage heads into this latest update with no changes to its price targets, so the analyst framework around the stock remains exactly where it was. With no fresh commentary from analysts to interpret, the current view is effectively on pause rather than reset. In the sections that follow, you will see how to track future revisions and what they might signal about the evolving narrative around Monster Beverage. headline: Record Quarter And Bigger Buyback Could Be A Game Changer For Monster Beverage (MNST)
summary: Monster Beverage Corporation recently reported its best-ever quarter, with Q1 2026 net sales rising to US$2.35 billion on the back of especially strong international growth, and it also authorized a fresh US$500 million share repurchase on top of about US$400 million remaining from a prior program. Together with ongoing benefits from its Coca-Cola distribution partnership and an asset-light business model, these moves highlight Monster’s focus on expanding globally while returning...
